shorts.title: What Is IR Drop?
shorts.description: The voltage you design isn't the voltage your transistors see. Here's why.

shorts.description: Where you place decaps matters more than how many you place.

shorts.title: Static vs Dynamic IR Drop
shorts.description: One is a snapshot. The other is the movie. You need both.

shorts.title: Power Grid 101
shorts.description: VDD rails, VSS rails, vias — your chip's circulatory system explained.

shorts.title: Electromigration Basics
shorts.description: Atoms move. Wires fail. Here's what every PD engineer should know.

shorts.title: YAML Anchors & Aliases
shorts.description: Stop copying config blocks. Use anchors to DRY up your YAML.

shorts.title: Multiline Strings in YAML
shorts.description: Pipe, fold, clip, strip — finally understand the difference.

shorts.title: 3 YAML Gotchas
shorts.description: Norway is not false. 08 is not 8. And tabs will ruin your day.
